title: Delete a member from a BC or revoke a member invitation
content:
Use this endpoint to delete a member in a Business Center or revoke a member invitation. You need to be an Admin of the Business Center. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path| /v1.2/bc/member/delete/| /v1.3/bc/member/delete/| |Request parameter data type|`bc_id`: number
`user_id`: number |`bc_id`: string
`user_id`: string | ``` ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/member/delete/ **Method** POST **Header** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token{Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| |Content-Type {Required}|string|The content type of the request.
Allowed value: `"application/json"` | ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |bc_id {Required} | string | Business Center ID.| | user_id {+Conditional}| string| Required when you want to remove existing members.

User ID.

To obtain the user IDs of existing members in a Business Center, use [/bc/member/get/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739939404802049) and check the returned `user_id`. | | user_email {+Conditional}| string | Required when you want to revoke the member invitation for a user.

User email.

To obtain the user emails of invited members for a Business Center, use [/bc/member/get/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739939404802049) and check the returned `user_email`. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl -H "Access-Token:xxx" -H "Content-Type:application/json" -X POST \ -d '{ "bc_id": "BC_ID", "user_id": "USER_ID", "user_email": "USER_EMAIL" }' \ https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/member/delete/ (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |code |number | Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string | Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |data |object| Returned data. | |request_id|string|The log id of the request, which uniquely identifies a request. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "message": "OK", "code": 0, "data": {} } (/code) ```
